商业财经.title: What to know about the 'buy, refinance, repeat' strategy helping real estate investors scale without tons of cash
商业财经.summary: "My strategy is basically to use every property to fund the next one," said one real estate investor.

商业财经.title: To unwind from his 12-hour shifts, this doctor splits his year between Kentucky and Venice—he pulls into his $438K apartment by boat
商业财经.summary: Alexander Gabrovsky grinds out 12-hour hospital shifts in the U.S., then takes off for month-long breathers at his Italian apartment accessible by boat.

商业财经.title: AI may be helping more people start their own businesses, but without many employees
商业财经.summary: The cofounders of one startup said they are bringing in $1 million per month with 13 employees thanks to AI.

商业财经.title: Mark Cuban bought a $25 million mansion sight unseen — and got it for 50% off. His secret? ‘The best guaranteed return on investment’
商业财经.summary: Cuban dropped millions on a mansion he'd never set foot in, but has zero regrets. The deal captures how billionaires think differently about money.

商业财经.title: The K-shaped economy has left many six-figure earners ‘on thin ice’ as housing costs, lifestyle creep, and the job market put them at risk
商业财经.summary: Many six-figure households earning more than $160,000 annually are “on thin ice,” while the income bracket below them are actually more “comfortable” thanks to their financial position.

商业财经.title: ‘Almost exactly offsetting the boost’: Higher gasoline prices this year could wipe out tax refunds from Trump’s One Big Beautiful Bill Act
商业财经.summary: Prices at the pump are almost a dollar more per gallon than a month ago following the U.S. strike on Iran and are poised to tick up even higher as the Strait of Hormuz remains closed.

商业财经.title: Meet the CFO who turned Adobe’s finance department into an AI lab
商业财经.summary: Dan Durn is auto-responding to 300,000 emails, slashing contract review times, and stress-testing earnings messaging with AI. His thesis: finance that doesn't adopt AI becomes a brake on growth.

商业财经.title: Trump gives Iran 48 hours on Hormuz, threatens power plants
商业财经.summary: The comments from Trump marked a dramatic escalation his rhetoric about the strait, a day after he said he was thinking about “winding down” the military operation.

商业财经.title: Israel says ‘war is not close to ending’ as its nuclear research center is targeted for first time, hours after Iranian enrichment site was hit
商业财经.summary: Israel's military said it was not able to intercept missiles that hit the southern cities of Dimona and Arad.

商业财经.title: OpenAI plans to almost double its headcount this year, FT says
商业财经.summary: The maker of AI assistant ChatGPT will look to increase headcount to about 8,000 from about 4,500, according to the Financial Times.

商业财经.title: BTS begins comeback tour to reclaim status as one of the world’s biggest pop acts after completing Korea’s mandatory military service
商业财经.summary: The hourlong concert came after the group on Friday released its fifth album, “ARIRANG,” which sold nearly 4 million copies in its first day.

商业财经.title: AI videos of sexualised black women removed from TikTok after BBC investigation
商业财经.summary: Dozens of Instagram and TikTok accounts have used AI avatars to promote explicit content, the BBC finds.
